description_long: This rocking chair features a modern design with a frame constructed from curved, turquoise-painted metal that forms both the armrests and the rocker base. The seat and backrest are composed of dark brown, horizontal wooden slats, providing both support and a visually appealing contrast to the frame. The armrests are smoothly integrated into the frame, following the same sweeping curve as the runners. The chair's base consists of two large, continuous curved runners that allow for a gentle rocking motion. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the slatted design offering breathability and comfort for outdoor urban environments such as parks or plazas. The finish on the wood is matte, while the metal frame has a slightly weathered, patinated look.
description: A modern rocking chair with a turquoise curved metal frame and dark brown slatted wooden seat and backrest, featuring integrated armrests and large curved runners for rocking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sweeping curve of the turquoise metal frame, the slatted wooden seat and backrest, and the continuous rocker base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the seat, the horizontal slats of the backrest, and the symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, emphasizing the curved runners and the ergonomic slant of the seat and backrest.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full backrest with horizontal slats and the ends of the armrests curving forward.
